channel.title: NVIDIA Newsroom
channel.description: The latest news and press releases from NVIDIA.

item.title: NVIDIA Announces Next-Generation GPU Architecture
item.description: NVIDIA today unveiled its next-generation GPU architecture.
item.content:
NVIDIA today unveiled its next-generation GPU architecture, delivering record performance for AI workloads.

The full press-release HTML body, kilobytes in reality.

item.title: NVIDIA Sets GTC 2026 Keynote Date
item.description: NVIDIA will host its annual GTC keynote in March 2026.
item.content: NVIDIA will host its annual GTC keynote in March 2026.
